title: Add DataExportButton CSS Class for Pendo Analytics Tracking
description:
Add a CSS class `DataExportButton` to all data export buttons across the application (CSV, Excel, PDF, Notion). The class has no visual effect — its purpose is to provide a consistent selector for Pendo to track how often individual users use export features.

This establishes a convention for future feature tracking: new features that should be tracked will receive dedicated CSS classes that Pendo can identify without requiring code changes in the analytics tool itself.
acceptance_criteria: All CSV export buttons have the DataExportButton CSS class
All Excel export buttons have the DataExportButton CSS class
All PDF export buttons have the DataExportButton CSS class
All Notion export buttons have the DataExportButton CSS class
CSS class does not affect the visual appearance of any buttons
Pendo can identify and track clicks on elements with this class
implementation_notes: The DataExportButton class is purely for analytics targeting — it carries no styles. This pattern of adding tracking-specific CSS classes should be followed for new features that need Pendo usage tracking.
comment_summary: Waqar completed the implementation and submitted for review on development.
